NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on 12th October 2023 by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No. S1234567A), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #05-67, Singapore 238456, and Mr. Ahmad bin Salleh (NRIC No. S7654321Z), with a registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #12-34, Singapore 048619, UEN 200912345K, and contactable at +65 6123 4567, email: ahmad.salleh@example.sg.

1. Confidential Information: "Confidential Information" shall mean all technical and non-technical information provided by Dr. Tan Wei Ming to Mr. Ahmad bin Salleh, including but not limited to, financial data, business strategies, research, and proprietary information marked or identified as confidential at the time of disclosure.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party: Mr. Ahmad bin Salleh agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the information disclosed by Dr. Tan Wei Ming, utilizing the same degree of care as used for his own confidential information, and shall not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without prior written consent from Dr. Tan Wei Ming.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
